metadata.description: A portable skillpack of agent workflows with host-specific adapters for Claude Code, Codex, and future runtimes.

plugins.name: workbench
plugins.description: Personal dev workbench — research workflows, skill recommendations, conversation memory capture, and skill lifecycle management.

plugins.name: agent-announcer-when-agent-finishes
plugins.description: Speaks a contextual one-line handover summary (with Ghostty tab number) when Claude or Codex finishes a turn or needs input.

plugins.name: extra
plugins.description: Small personal workflows that are useful enough to package but do not belong in Workbench.

plugins.name: agents
plugins.description: Harness-agnostic agent operating modes for review closeout, watching, verifying, and carrying context across live work.

plugins.name: videos
plugins.description: Opinionated video preproduction workflows for storyboard frames, product-launch motion direction, and AI-video-ready shot batches.
